project_type: Flutter mobile app with Supabase backend
test_framework: flutter_test (no existing tests for admin module)
verification_instructions: Run flutter analyze on the admin module to verify no compilation errors. Since this is a Flutter app without a connected Supabase backend in the sandbox, static analysis is the primary verification method.
environment_constraints: No Flutter SDK available in sandbox for compilation. Use AST/syntax validation only. No Supabase connection for runtime testing. Network mode likely limited. Validate Dart files by syntax correctness.
contribution_requirements: Work on main branch. Don't touch build flow (.github/workflows). Use Supabase Storage for images (not Firebase Storage). Use image_picker for gallery selection. All admin screens use local setState for loading, not global isLoading. Screens must be mobile responsive.
key_patterns: ConsumerStatefulWidget pattern with local _loading, _error, _items state variables. AdminNotifier/StateNotifier pattern for shared CRUD operations. Supabase client accessed via supabaseClientProvider. GoRouter for navigation. AppColors, AppTypography, AppSpacing from core/theme/. AdminNavDrawer for drawer navigation. AlertDialog with StatefulBuilder for create/edit forms.
directory_structure: lib/features/admin/ contains data/repositories/, domain/providers/, presentation/screens/, presentation/widgets/. Core utilities in lib/core/ (theme, router, network, constants). SQL schema in sql/. The app uses Riverpod StateNotifier for admin state, Supabase SupabaseClient for DB operations.
